2026-04-21T06:40:55.2237118Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2237717Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2238047Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2238353Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2238599Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2238782Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2238910Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239057Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239191Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239371Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239531Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239749Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T06:40:55.2239947Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues","icons":[{"src":"data:image/png;base64,","mimeType":"image/png","theme":"light"},{"src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABgAAAAYCAYAAADgdz34AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAABxElEQVRIibWVvW4TURCFv0vlNEDcIHAkKAERJOIK...

New `ModelFactory` methods were added for several types (`HDInsightClusterCreateOrUpdateContent`, `HDInsightClusterRole`, `HDInsightSecurityProfile`, etc.) and API version was upgraded to include Entra User support as cluster administrator credentials.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **No service-specific Key Concepts section** — the current README links to generic SDK docs instead of describing HDInsight-specific resource types (e.g., `HDInsightClusterResource`, `HDInsightApplicationResource`, `HDInsightClusterCollection`)\\n- **No code examples** — the Examples section only points to a generic samples link; there are no inline code snippets showing how to create, list, update, or delete HDInsight clusters or applications\\n- **No test-backed snippets** — there is no `tests/Samples/` directory at all; the test directory only contains `Scenario/` tests\\n- **Missing Entra User / new API feature documentation** — the CHANGELOG describes Entra User as cluster administrator (added in 1.2.0-beta.5) but the README does not mention this capability\\n- **\\u0026#34;Getting started\\u0026#34; section is incomplete** — it lacks a concrete example of authenticating and creating a `HDInsightClusterResource` client\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**Edit** `sdk/hdinsight/Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight/README.md`:\\n\\nReplace the generic boilerplate **Key concepts** section with HDInsight-specific content:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n### HDInsightClusterResource\\n\\nAn `HDInsightClusterResource` represents a single HDInsight cluster. It exposes operations to get, update, delete, resize, rotate disk encryption keys, and retrieve monitoring/gateway settings.\\n\\n### HDInsightClusterCollection\\n\\n`HDInsightClusterCollection` is obtained from a resource group and provides operations to create, list, and check existence of HDInsight clusters.\\n\\n### HDInsightApplicationResource\\n\\n`HDInsightApplicationResource` represents an application installed on an HDInsight cluster. It exposes CRUD operations for cluster applications.\\n\\n### Thread safety\\n\\nWe guarantee that all client instance methods are thread-safe and independent of each other ([guideline]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n\\n### Additional concepts\\n[Client options](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#configuring-service-clients-using-clientoptions) |\\n[Accessing the response](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#accessing-http-response-details-using-responset) |\\n[Long-running operations](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#consuming-long-running-operations-using-operationt) |\\n[Handling failures](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#reporting-errors-requestfailedexception) |\\n[Diagnostics](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#logging) |\\n[Mocking](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#mocking) |\\n[Client lifetime]((devblogs.microsoft.com/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nReplace the generic **Examples** section with snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create an HDInsight cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### List HDInsight clusters in a resource group\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Get an existing HDInsight cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Delete an HDInsight cluster\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**Create** `sdk/hdinsight/Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight/tests/Samples/Sample1_Clusters.cs`:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core.TestFramework;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_Clusters : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task CreateCluster()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:HDInsightCreateCluster\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            string subscriptionId = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\\u0026#34;AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()\\n                .GetAwaiter().GetResult()\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            HDInsightClusterCollection clusters = resourceGroup.GetHDInsightClusters();\\n\\n            string clusterName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            HDInsightClusterCreateOrUpdateContent content = new HDInsightClusterCreateOrUpdateContent\\n            {\\n                Location = Azure.Core.AzureLocation.EastUS,\\n                Properties = new HDInsightClusterCreateOrUpdateProperties\\n                {\\n                    ClusterVersion = \\u0026#34;5.1\\u0026#34;,\\n                    OsType = HDInsightOSType.Linux,\\n                    ClusterDefinition = new HDInsightClusterDefinition\\n                    {\\n                        Kind = \\u0026#34;spark\\u0026#34;,\\n                    },\\n                },\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await clusters.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed, clusterName, content);\\n            HDInsightClusterResource cluster = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Cluster \\u0026#39;{cluster.Data.Name}\\u0026#39; created\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n\\n#if !SNIPPET\\n            Assert.IsNotNull(cluster);\\n            Assert.AreEqual(clusterName, cluster.Data.Name);\\n#endif\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task ListClusters()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:HDInsightListClusters\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()\\n                .GetAwaiter().GetResult()\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            await foreach (HDInsightClusterResource cluster in resourceGroup.GetHDInsightClusters())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine(cluster.Data.Name);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task GetCluster()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:HDInsightGetCluster\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()\\n                .GetAwaiter().GetResult()\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            HDInsightClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup.GetHDInsightClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Cluster state: {cluster.Data.Properties?.ClusterState}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task DeleteCluster()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:HDInsightDeleteCluster\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()\\n                .GetAwaiter().GetResult()\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            HDInsightClusterResource cluster = await resourceGroup.GetHDInsightClusters()\\n                .GetAsync(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n            await cluster.DeleteAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\\n            Console.WriteLine(\\u0026#34;Cluster deleted\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nFor each snippet, the README placeholder (```` ```C# Snippet: ```` followed by closing ```` ``` ````) must match the `#region Snippet:` tag exactly.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/hdinsight/Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight/README.md` currently
